transcript.text: Hi, this is Priya from BluQQ! How can I help you today?
I want to create a chatbot for my restaurant.
That sounds great! Are you looking for a chatbot for customer service or for taking orders?
Can you tell me what features I can add in my chatbot?
Absolutely! You can add features like menu browsing, order placement, reservation booking, and even answering common customer questions.
Would you also like it to handle feedback or loyalty programs for your restaurant?
Yes, absolutely! You can include voucher or discount code options in the chatbot to offer special promotions. Would that be something
You can easily integrate a voucher system by connecting the chatbot to your existing promotions database or having it generate custom codes.
